title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team used with Claude Code to achieve rapid scaling, including automating workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building specialized tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He also identifies a common ceiling where AI can become additional work rather than leverage.
